user.title: RIPE Atlas probes
user.description: Enter one public RIPE Atlas probe per line. Use `probe_id` or `probe_id, friendly name`.

reconfigure.title: Edit RIPE Atlas probes
reconfigure.description:
Update the probe list, then submit to reload the integration. Current probes:

```text
{probes}
```

Use one public RIPE Atlas probe per line: `probe_id` or `probe_id, friendly name`.

error.duplicate_probe: Each probe ID can only be entered once.
error.invalid_probe: Probe IDs must be whole numbers.
error.no_probes: Enter at least one probe ID.
